title: Graham Cracker Cake
recipe: Mix together in bowl! Mix with other ingredients. Bake 1 hr. 30 min at 350° in Tube pan.

title: Icing (For Graham Cracker Cake or Mud Cake)
recipe: Add small marshmallows when you take cake out of oven & then spread icing.

title: Coconut Crispys
ingredients: 1/2 c crushed Corn Flake (2 cups regular)
recipe: 350° 10 min. (Double except Flour).

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipe: Preheat oven to 375°. Cream in mixer: Margarine, Brown Sugar, Sugar, vanilla. Beat and add: 2 eggs. Then add gradually: Flour, baking soda. When finished mixing add: chocolate chips, chopped nuts. Drop batter by teaspoonfull on cookie sheet. Bake at 375° for 8–10 min. Yield: 7–8 dozen.

title: Mississippi Mud Cake
recipe: Mix. Grease & flour 13x9x2" pan. Bake at 350° for 20 min.

title: Yummy Bars
recipe:
Mix together — Put half of mixture in 9x13 Pan. Bake 6 minutes at 350°. Remove from oven. Sprinkle 6 oz of choc chips and 1 c. nuts over layer. Melt pkg. of caramels in 1/3 c. evaporated milk. Pour over cake in pan. Add other 1/2 of cake mixture on top of caramel nut layer. Bake 15–20 minutes at 350°.

"When you spread the table, contentions will cease." — Israeli Proverb

title: Lemon Freeze Pie
recipe: Mix altogether & put in graham crust. Freeze. Easy — Fast — Good.

title: Potato Cheese & Broccoli Soup
ingredients: Scant cup very finely diced Broccoli
1 pkg Cream cheese (add in small chunks)
1/2 Pkg. Cream Cheese (4 oz) OR 2 bottles Kraft Bacon Cheese Spread
recipe: Sauté on Medium Heat: onion, butter, pepper. Add & Simmer 15 min: Potatoes, Chicken Broth, finely diced broccoli. Then add: milk, Velveeta, Cream cheese, Broccoli. Simmer. Watch or it will Burn on Bottom.

title: Pineapple Delight
recipe:
Butter an 8x12 Pyrex Baking dish. Bake at 350°. Time to prepare — 30 min.

From the recipe file of Eloise Parrish.

title: Meat Balls
recipe: These are all approx. Mix all ingredients except Hamburger well. Then add Hamburger. Form into Balls. Brown in iron skillet on all sides — be careful not to burn! Mix can of Cream of Chicken and 1/2 can water, add to balls and cover for about 1/2 hour on med low.

title: Vegetable Bean Soup with Piston
ingredients: 1 cup beans (3/4 c dry white + 1/4 c Fava Beans)
1 c. Fresh Tomatoes — Peeled, Seeded, Diced
3/4 c. Green Beans — Cut in 1/2" sections
1/2 c. Freshly grated Parmesan, Romano, Asiago, or Swiss
Piston: 1/3 c. fresh Basil or 2 T. dried
Piston: 3 T. fresh Thyme or 2 T. dried
Piston: 1 Italian plum tomato, chopped fine
recipe:
(1) Soak beans overnight. Simmer until tender. Drain and save bean stock. (2) In large sauce pan heat oil. Add onions and garlic. Sauté 2 min. Add curry powder, sauté until onions are tender. (3) Add Tomatoes — Cook 2 min. (4) Add water to bean stock to make 8 cups. Add this to the onions and garlic mixture. Add carrots and Potatoes — Simmer Till Tender. (5) Add green beans, zucchini, pepper and noodles. Simmer Till Tender. (6) Add the beans and heat. If too thick add a little boiling water. (7) Add the Piston just before serving. (8) Pass the grated cheese.

Piston: Mash spices into paste. Add tomato, cheese and salt. Beat in olive oil 1 T. at a time. When ready to serve, add some soup to thin the mixture.

title: Chili
recipe:
Chop small onion & 1/2 pepper — sauté until limp, about 5 mins. Brown 1 lb. lean ground round. Lower heat to simmer. Add 1/2 can peeled tomatoes broken up small. Add 1 can kidney beans, salt & pepper to taste, small pinch oregano & larger pinch basil, 1 small bay leaf broken up well & 1 T. chili powder. Sprinkle well with paprika. Turn heat up a bit & simmer 1/2 to 1 hr.

— Minda Bregerson

title: "TuTu" Ranch Dressing
recipe: Mix ingredients together.

title: Aunt Ceil's Egg Nog
recipe: Beat eggs along with sugar — allow 1 egg per person. Pour in milk, stir. Fold in sweet cream — have to judge about how much you need. Put a little sticky in to cook eggs. Drink hot or cold.

title: Mexican Bean Dip
recipe: (1) Heat beans & picante sauce until they bubble. (2) Add cheese & heat until it begins to melt. Serve with tortilla chips.

title: Home Style Dressing Mix
ingredients: 1 c. Mayonnaise (or sub Sour Cream for Buttermilk)
recipe: Make up Ahead of Time — Keeps for 6 months. Mix dry ingredients. When ready to use, combine with 1 c. Buttermilk and 1 c. Mayonnaise. Or substitute Sour Cream for Buttermilk for a thicker dressing.

title: Punch
recipe: Thaw frozen concentrates. Combine all ingredients and stir gently. Serve chilled.

title: Tootsie Rolls
recipe: Cook honey to hard ball stage (255°F). Remove from heat. Stir in cocoa + vanilla thoroughly. Add powdered milk. Blend well. Cool enough to handle & form into a roll the size of a pencil. Cut into 2" pieces & wrap.

title: Richard Simmons Sugarless Berry Jam
ingredients: 2 cups white grape juice or apple juice
recipe: Sprinkle all gelatin over about 1/2 cup fruit juice. Let gelatin soften 3 minutes. Puree berries in blender. In saucepan combine pureed fruit + softened gelatin & all remaining ingredients. Bring to a slow & steady boil. Skim foam.

title: Trisha's Blue Cheese Salad Dressing
ingredients: Dash Sea Salt & Pepper to taste
recipe: Add all ingredients in blender. Add milk for desired thickness.

title: Fresh Fruit Tart with Lemon Almond Pastry Cream
ingredients: Pastry Cream: 4–6 c. Berries for topping
recipe:
Crust: Blend in Mixer. Bake at 375° for 20–25 min in an oiled fluted tart pan.

Pastry Cream: Temper the eggs with the cream! Combine half & half, almond extract, lemon zest and sugar in a saucepan over medium heat. Whisk egg yolks with cornstarch separately. Slowly pour warm cream into egg mixture to temper, then return all to pan and cook until thickened. Stir in lemon juice. Cool completely before filling tart shell. Top with fresh berries.
